rentalpermission-rental-active: Rental already active for this block ({0}). No additional payment is required.
rentalpermission-rental-registered: Rental registered for "{0}" at {1}. Use /rentalpermission mine to view your rentals.
rentalpermission-manual-protection-remov: Protection was removed manually. {0} active rental(s) for this block were cancelled without refund.
rentalpermission-not-reinforceable: This block can not be reinforced.
rentalpermission-no-reinforcement-materi: You do not have a valid material to reinforce this block. Keep a stone, copper ingot or another material accepted by the reinforcement system in your inventory, then use the plumb and square again.
rentalpermission-lock-requires-reinforce: This block must be reinforced before it can be locked.
rentalpermission-already-reinforced: Cannot reinforce block, it is already reinforced.
rentalpermission-denied-build: You need build access or delegated rental privilege '{0}' to rent this block.
rentalpermission-denied-use: You need use access in this claim to rent this block.
rentalpermission-denied-limit: Rental denied: you already have {0} active rental(s) for '{1}'. Limit: {2}.
rentalpermission-denied-market-api: Market rental denied: the server could not validate the linked market stall.
rentalpermission-denied-market-no-filter: Market rental denied: no market stall block code or prefix is configured for this rule.
rentalpermission-denied-market-no-match: Market rental denied: no matching market stall was found within {0} block(s).
rentalpermission-denied-market-multiple: Market rental denied: {0} matching market stalls were found near this block. Expected exactly one. Matches: {1}
rentalpermission-payment-required: Rental payment required: {0}x {1}. You currently have {2}. Put the required currency in your inventory and try again.
rentalpermission-expired: Your rental "{0}" at {1} has expired. Action: {2}.
rentalpermission-list-no-player-rentals: You do not have any registered rentals.
rentalpermission-player-command-only: This command must be run by an online player.
rentalpermission-renew-own-only: You can only renew your own rentals.
rentalpermission-renew-non-expiring: This rental does not expire and cannot be renewed.
rentalpermission-renew-in-world-only: Rentals must be renewed at the rented block. Interact with it while the rental is active.
rentalpermission-renewal-already-pending: Rental {0} already has one prepaid renewal pending.
rentalpermission-renewal-pending: Prepaid renewal registered for rental {0}: {1}x {2} for {3}. It will be applied when the current rental expires.
rentalpermission-renewal-applied: Your prepaid renewal for "{0}" has been applied. New remaining time: {1}.
rentalpermission-cancelled: Rental {0} cancelled. The block was not modified.
rentalpermission-command-failed: RentalPermission command '{0}' failed. Contact an administrator if the problem continues.
rentalpermission-client-required: This rental requires the RentalPermission client UI. Install the mod on the client and try again.
rentalpermission-rental-confirmation-req: This rental must be confirmed from the rental window before modifying the block. Try interacting with the block again.
rentalpermission-request-expired: This rental request expired. Please try again.
rentalpermission-hold-reinforcement-tool: Keep the plumb and square in your active hand before confirming the rental.
rentalpermission-hold-padlock: Keep the padlock in your active hand before confirming the rental.
rentalpermission-remove-protection-faile: The protection could not be removed. Reason: {0}
rentalpermission-ui-remove-main: You are about to remove the protection from {0}. This block has an active rental attached to that protection.
rentalpermission-ui-remove-warning: If you continue, the protection will be removed and the active rental will be cancelled without refund.
rentalpermission-ui-payment-ok: You have enough currency in your inventory.
rentalpermission-ui-payment-missing: You are missing {0} required currency item(s).
rentalpermission-ui-note: The server will take the payment from your inventory after you press Rent. Keep the tool or padlock in your active hand.
rentalpermission-ui-summary: Pay {0}x {1} to rent this block for {2} and {3}.
rentalpermission-ui-note-short: Payment is taken from your inventory only after you press Rent.
rentalpermission-ui-main: To {0}, you must accept its rental first.
rentalpermission-ui-main-renewal: This rental is already active. You may prepay one renewal, which will be applied when the current rental expires.
rentalpermission-ui-description-required: Write a short rental description first.
rentalpermission-ui-expiration-warning: If this rental expires without renewal, its configured expiration action may remove protection and expose stored items.
